reviews.comment:
Atención no es la mejor y ahora cobran servicio de aire que otras no cobran, aunque es autoservicio no te prestan el servicio además de pagarlo

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't the best, and now they charge for air conditioning that other places don't, even though it's self-service; they don't actually provide the service, and you still have to pay for it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4c3VyMVZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Poco espacio y atienden al voleo, sin dar prioridad al que llega primero

(Translated by Google)
Little space and they attend to people randomly, without giving priority to whoever arrives first.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xObGJtWllOV1UxY1hWcWNIb3RPRzVDVGkxbUxVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Espectacular la atención, el café, buenísimo. El lugar es muy agradable para compartir con amigos, muy buen ambientado.

(Translated by Google)
The service was spectacular, and the coffee was excellent. The place is very pleasant to share with friends, with a great atmosphere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWUWNWaHZZVVJXUW10amREWjVaV3QxVldwVGVrRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad quiero dejar mi muy mal descontento por la atención de uno de los empleados del turno noche, muy mala predisposición, muy mala onda, hoy siendo las 02.09 AM del día 08/12/25, espero tomen cartas en el asunto, malísima la atención del muchacho, pésima, ya en reiteradas ocasiones.

(Translated by Google)
I really want to express my strong dissatisfaction with the service I received from one of the night shift employees. He was very unhelpful and had a very bad attitude. This happened today at 2:09 AM on December 8, 2025. I hope you will take action. The young man's service was terrible, absolutely awful, and this has happened repeatedly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkRU4xOHhORzlIZEhObVNXaDNOVTR5UWsxTVVuYxAB

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por opinar sobre nuestro servicio, esperamos vuelva pronto a visitarnos. Saludos cordiales. Equipo ACA Corrientes
